meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Rapid App Dev: The Antigravity Template for Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with slow development. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to accelerate your portfolio building and ship production-ready apps.
content.answer_block: Slow development stems from boilerplate fatigue and architectural friction. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you eliminate repetitive scaffolding. Combined with Claude Code, you transform intent into execution instantly. This stack allows you to bypass hours of configuration, focusing entirely on high-impact logic and building your professional portfolio.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. Hours disappear into configuration hell, dependency conflicts, and boilerplate setup—time that should be spent architecting the next generation of AI-driven applications. The gap between your innovative vision and a working prototype feels like a chasm that only senior engineers can cross.

But the rules of the game have changed. By integrating the Antigravity project template with the raw power of Claude Code, you aren't just writing code; you are orchestrating it. This workflow is the secret weapon of elite builders, turning the friction of manual development into a seamless, high-velocity stream of production-ready features.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundation by cloning the boilerplate. This ensures your project follows industry-standard directory structures and type-safe configurations from the first millisecond.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity core template with TypeScript, TailwindCSS, and Supabase integration enabled.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Translate your app's core data requirements into schema definitions that the template can consume to generate CRUD operations automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate domain models for a multi-tenant SaaS application including User, Workspace, and Project entities with strict TypeScript interfaces.

steps.title: Implement Business Logic with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject specific business requirements into your scaffolded services, ensuring your logic is decoupled and testable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a service layer for managing workspace access control using the existing Antigravity auth provider.

steps.title: Automate UI Component Assembly
steps.description: Rapidly build your frontend by instructing the agent to hook your service layer into the Antigravity UI component library.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard view that lists all projects and supports real-time filtering using the Antigravity Table component.

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Run the final test suite and prepare the build pipeline for production deployment, ensuring zero-downtime configurations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run full integration tests and configure the Vercel deployment manifest for the current project build.

pro_tips: Always use 'semantic commits' via Claude Code to keep your git history clean for potential employers reviewing your repo.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-reload' feature by keeping the Claude Code daemon running in a split-terminal view.
Refactor your generated code periodically; treat Claude as a junior dev who writes the code, but you as the lead who optimizes the complexity.
Create a custom 'context.md' file in your root folder to ensure every Claude Code session understands your specific architectural preferences.
Use Antigravity's built-in telemetry to identify bottlenecks in your application performance before you even push to production.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, focus on adding a custom authentication flow and integrating a third-party payment gateway to complete your portfolio piece.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace 99% of developers. Stop building slowly and start scaling your impact. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
